name: R1 Customer Agent

connections: HubSpot API, Google Sheets, Microsoft Teams

description: Creates DFC First to Market email drafts in HubSpot for new product launches with sales sheets and monthly recap emails

description: Runs a weekly checkup on all paid channels to show the performance compared to an average of the previous month

name: Monthly Report Bot

name: Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync
description: Automatically adds customers who completed the amazon flyer "warranty" into our audience on Meta
